name: Google Street View
description: Google service providing interactive 360-degree panoramic imagery of streets, landmarks, and indoor spaces worldwide.

years.notes: Material-design pegman icon used by the standalone Google Street View mobile app from late 2019 until its discontinuation on 21 March 2023. Pegman head circle overlaps the top-right of a rounded green panel bearing the white Google 'G'; an orange body with a yellow chevron sits over a gray perspective road. Redrawn to a 24x24 viewBox via scale(0.0067055) over the native 3579x3581 Wikimedia source; decorative shadow overlays and radial highlights were dropped to keep the silhouette crisp at 16px.
